name: Don Rickles
bio: Don Rickles was an American stand-up comedian known as the master of insult comedy, earning the nicknames Mr. Warmth and the Merchant of Venom for rapid-fire put-downs aimed at audience members and celebrities alike. A Las Vegas headliner and ubiquitous talk-show guest, he became a fixture on The Tonight Show Starring Johnny Carson and later voiced Mr. Potato Head in the Toy Story films.

timeline.ev: Makes his film debut in Run Silent, Run Deep
First appears on The Tonight Show Starring Johnny Carson
Releases the live comedy album Hello, Dummy!
Stars in the NBC sitcom C.P.O. Sharkey
Voices Mr. Potato Head in Toy Story and plays Billy Sherbert in Casino
Wins a Primetime Emmy for the documentary Mr. Warmth: The Don Rickles Project

accolades: Primetime Emmy Award for Mr. Warmth: The Don Rickles Project (2007)
Star on the Hollywood Walk of Fame
Iconic frequent guest on The Tonight Show Starring Johnny Carson

specials.t: Mr. Warmth: The Don Rickles Project
